pub(crate) fn cache_size(

use assert_cmd::assert::OutputAssertExt;

use uv_test::uv_snapshot;

/// Test that `cache stats` shows zero sizes for an empty cache (raw output).
#[test]
fn cache_stats_empty_raw() {
    let context = uv_test::test_context!("3.12");

    // Clean cache first to ensure a truly empty state.
    context.clean().assert().success();

    uv_snapshot!(context.cache_stats().arg("--preview"), @"
    success: true
    exit_code: 0
    ----- stdout -----
    wheels-v6        0
    sdists-v9        0
    flat-index-v2    0
    git-v0           0
    interpreter-v4   0
    simple-v21       0
    archive-v0       0
    builds-v0        0
    environments-v2  0
    python-v0        0
    binaries-v0      0
    -----------------------
    Total            0

    ----- stderr -----
    ");
}

/// Test that `cache stats` shows non-zero sizes after installing packages (raw output).
#[test]
fn cache_stats_with_packages_raw() {
    let context = uv_test::test_context!("3.12");

    // Install a requirement to populate the cache.
    context.pip_install().arg("iniconfig").assert().success();

    uv_snapshot!(context.with_filtered_cache_stats().filters(), context.cache_stats().arg("--preview"), @"
    success: true
    exit_code: 0
    ----- stdout -----
    wheels-v6        [SIZE]
    sdists-v9  [SIZE]
    flat-index-v2  [SIZE]
    git-v0  [SIZE]
    interpreter-v4  [SIZE]
    simple-v21  [SIZE]
    archive-v0  [SIZE]
    builds-v0  [SIZE]
    environments-v2  [SIZE]
    python-v0  [SIZE]
    binaries-v0  [SIZE]
    [SEPARATOR]
    Total  [SIZE]

    ----- stderr -----
    ");
}

/// Test that `cache stats --human` shows human-readable sizes after installing packages.
#[test]
fn cache_stats_with_packages_human() {
    let context = uv_test::test_context!("3.12");

    // Install a requirement to populate the cache.
    context.pip_install().arg("iniconfig").assert().success();

    uv_snapshot!(context.with_filtered_cache_stats().filters(), context.cache_stats().arg("--preview").arg("--human"), @"
    success: true
    exit_code: 0
    ----- stdout -----
    wheels-v6        [SIZE]
    sdists-v9  [SIZE]
    flat-index-v2  [SIZE]
    git-v0  [SIZE]
